```{r overall_presc_3, echo=FALSE}
# Cải tiến promo_decision từ Q6 bằng cách bổ sung elasticity context
final_promo_decision <- promo_decision %>%
  left_join(
    df_3 %>%
      filter(has_promo == "1") %>%
      group_by(promo_name) %>%
      summarise(
        avg_discount_rate = mean(discount_rate, na.rm = TRUE),
        category_top      = names(sort(table(category), decreasing = TRUE))[1],
        .groups = "drop"
      ),
    by = "promo_name"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    # Kết hợp ROI + recommendation để ra quyết định cuối
    final_action = case_when(
      recommendation == "KILL — destroys margin"                       ~ "🔴 KILL",
      recommendation == "KEEP — positive ROI" & promo_roi > 2          ~ "🟢 SCALE UP",
      recommendation == "KEEP — positive ROI"                          ~ "🟢 KEEP",
      recommendation == "OPTIMIZE — thin margin" & avg_discount_rate > overall_optimal_dr ~ "🟡 CUT DISCOUNT",
      TRUE                                                              ~ "🟡 A/B TEST"
    )
  ) %>%
  select(promo_name, promo_type, n_orders, total_gross_rev, total_net_margin,
         promo_roi, avg_discount_rate, recommendation, final_action) %>%
  arrange(promo_roi)

final_promo_decision %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title    = md("**Final Promo Rationalization Decision**"),
    subtitle = md(paste0(
      "Based on ROI + Elasticity-adjusted Optimal Discount (",
      scales::percent(overall_optimal_dr, accuracy=0.1), ")"
    ))
  ) %>%
  fmt_number(columns = c(total_gross_rev, total_net_margin, n_orders), 
             decimals = 0, use_seps = TRUE) %>%
  fmt_percent(columns = avg_discount_rate, decimals = 1) %>%
  fmt_number(columns = promo_roi, decimals = 2) %>%
  data_color(columns = promo_roi, palette = c("#E24B4A", "white", "#1D9E75")) %>%
  tab_style(
    style     = cell_fill(color = "#FDECEA"),
    locations = cells_body(rows = final_action == "🔴 KILL")
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style     = cell_fill(color = "#EAF7EF"),
    locations = cells_body(rows = final_action == "🟢 SCALE UP")
  )
```

### S4. Executive Summary Dashboard — 1 trang tổng kết

```{r overall_presc_4, echo=FALSE}
library(patchwork)

# KPI summary cards thay bằng plots đơn giản
kpi_data <- tibble(
  metric = c("Total Revenue", "Total Promo Cost", "Promo ROI\n(Overall)", 
             "Optimal Discount", "% Unprofitable\nPromo Orders"),
  value  = c(
    sum(df_3$gross_revenue, na.rm = TRUE),
    sum(df_3$discount_amount, na.rm = TRUE),
    sum(df_3$net_margin[df_3$has_promo == "1"], na.rm = TRUE) /
      pmax(sum(df_3$discount_amount[df_3$has_promo == "1"], na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    overall_optimal_dr,
    mean(df_3$net_margin[df_3$has_promo == "1"] < 0, na.rm = TRUE)
  ),
  format = c("comma", "comma", "ratio", "pct", "pct"),
  color  = c("#4A90E2", "#E24B4A", "#2ECC71", "#F39C12", "#E74C3C")
)

kpi_data %>%
  mutate(
    label = case_when(
      format == "comma" ~ scales::comma(round(value, 0)),
      format == "pct"   ~ scales::percent(value, accuracy = 0.1),
      TRUE              ~ as.character(round(value, 2))  # <-- thêm as.character()
    )
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(metric, -value), y = 1, fill = color)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 2, width = 0.95, height = 0.95) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), fontface = "bold", size = 6, color = "white") +
  geom_text(aes(y = 0.6, label = metric), size = 3.2, color = "white", lineheight = 1.2) +
  scale_fill_identity() +
  coord_fixed() +
  labs(title = "Executive KPI Dashboard — Promo Performance Overview") +
  theme_void() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14, hjust = 0.5))
```

### S5. Action Roadmap — Timeline thực thi 90 ngày

```{r overall_presc_5, echo=FALSE}
roadmap <- data.frame(
  Phase   = c(rep("Phase 1 (Tháng 1): Quick Wins", 3),
              rep("Phase 2 (Tháng 2): Optimization", 3),
              rep("Phase 3 (Tháng 3): Scale & Monitor", 3)),
  Action  = c(
    # Phase 1
    "KILL toàn bộ promo ROI < 0 (tiết kiệm chi phí ngay lập tức)",
    "Cap discount rate tối đa theo optimal rate tìm được",
    "Disable stackable promo nếu ROI stack < ROI đơn lẻ",
    # Phase 2
    "A/B test recommended discount per segment (Champions vs At Risk)",
    "Triển khai Freeship cho Champions thay discount tiền mặt",
    "Điều chỉnh promo theo category elasticity (tránh discount category inelastic)",
    # Phase 3
    "Scale promo campaign nào A/B test WIN sang toàn bộ segment",
    "Monthly promo ROI review meeting",
    "Build live dashboard theo dõi: margin erosion / promo penetration"
  ),
  Owner   = c("Promo Team","Promo Team","Tech","Marketing","Marketing",
               "Category Mgr","Marketing","Leadership","BI Team"),
  Impact  = c("High","High","Medium","High","Medium","High","High","Medium","Low"),
  Effort  = c("Low","Low","Medium","Medium","Low","Medium","Low","Low","High")
)

roadmap %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title    = md("**90-Day Action Roadmap — Promo Optimization**"),
    subtitle = "Thứ tự ưu tiên: Phase 1 → 2 → 3"
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style     = cell_fill(color = "#EAF7EF"),
    locations = cells_body(rows = grepl("Phase 1", Phase))
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style     = cell_fill(color = "#FEF9E7"),
    locations = cells_body(rows = grepl("Phase 2", Phase))
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style     = cell_fill(color = "#EAF2F8"),
    locations = cells_body(rows = grepl("Phase 3", Phase))
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style     = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_body(rows = Impact == "High" & Effort == "Low")
  ) %>%
  cols_label(
    Phase  = "Phase",
    Action = "Action Item",
    Owner  = "Owner",
    Impact = "Business Impact",
    Effort = "Implementation Effort"
  )
```
